---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#15/16: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture VIII`` (March 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **15**  | 51 | 23/03/2026 | - Sprint#15: ApartmentPredictor  Full-Architecture VIII </br></br>  - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins </br></br> - **Queries**: JPQL, Criteria API, native</br></br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: **v5** </br> (2) Component for Filter  | - [ApartmentPrediction: 25282b](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/commits/25282b89057b25037608128dd168cd74f65ea5b2/){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: 9e8a550](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/9e8a5505271663b85de05abc49a2b8d4af3bab55){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Spring Boot: JPA Queries](/springboot/boot-concepts-jpa-4.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [query-creation definition](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-methods-details.html#repositories.query-methods.query-creation){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [query-creation](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/jpa/query-methods.html#jpa.query-methods.query-creation){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [query method subject keywords](https://docs.spring.io/spring-data/jpa/reference/repositories/query-keywords-reference.html#appendix.query.method.subject){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Spring Expression Language (SpEL)](https://docs.spring.io/spring-framework/reference/7.0/core/expressions.html){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [Lab#02: Derived Queries](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2302_Derived_Queries.md){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [dijkstras-java](https://codingtechroom.com/tutorial/java-implementing-dijkstras-algorithm-in-java){.external target='_blank'}|
|   | 52 | 24/03/2026 | - Java Spring Boot: </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v6** </br> (2) `Pagination` and `Pageable` </br> (3) Testing Postman </br>  (4) `Cascade` definition for `Apartment` </br> (5) Queries </br> (6) JPA Specification from Criteria API : `Reviewer` & Joins </br> (7) `School`: geoposition field</br>   </br> - <s>Queries: JPQL, Criteria API, native</s></br></br> - React:   </br> (1) ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc: **v6.0**, just skeleton </br> (2)  Component *page* for `School` and *entry-point* component  </br> (3) map for `leafletjs`  </br> (4) **create-assign** `school`-`apartment`  </br> </br> - `ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.1**, refactor </br> (0) `ApartmentPrediction-React` **API, Data & State Layers refactor**: </br> (1) define current state </br> (2) which options do we have? </br> (3) decision-making: *option c*  </br> (4) create a plan and implementation phases </br>   | - [ApartmentPrediction: 4c01d893](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/4c01d893ece7acb73147c1a40672f48855a54876){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: a012a86](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/a012a8615df31327a3dbaadb95806b55a1e36143){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [leafletjs](https://leafletjs.com/){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [leafletjs-react](https://react-leaflet.js.org/){.external target='_blank'}</br> </br>  - [dataModel-refactor: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}  </br>  [(1) datamodel-refactor.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/datamodel-refactor.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br>  [(2) data-layer-options.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/data-layer-options.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(3) refactor-plan-implement.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-implement.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [React Best Practices by Vercel: skill](https://mcpservers.org/agent-skills/vercel/react-best-practices){.external target='_blank'} |
|   |    | | |
|   | 53 | 26/03/2026 | - `ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.1**, refactor </br> (0) `ApartmentPrediction-React` API, Data & State Layers refactor: </br> (1) define current state </br> (2) which options do we have? </br> (3) decision-making: *option C*  </br> (4) create a plan and implementation phases </br> (5) code, **implement** and **review** it </br></br> ++ Mindset: how to face AI times | - [ApartmentPrediction-React: a5545183 at refactor-middleware-data](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/a55451830aa35d169ff5e26389e7e31c0ce75caf){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br>- [dataModel-refactor: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(1) datamodel-refactor.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/datamodel-refactor.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br>  [(2) data-layer-options.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/data-layer-options.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br>  [(3) refactor-plan-implement.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-implement.md){.external target='_blank'}   </br> [(4) refactor-plan-review.md](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor/refactor-plan-review.md){.external target='_blank'}    </br> - [React Best Practices by Vercel: skill](https://mcpservers.org/agent-skills/vercel/react-best-practices){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [Claude Code](https://claude.com/product/claude-code){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Open Code](https://opencode.ai/){.external target='_blank'}  </br>- [Amz Q Dev](https://aws.amazon.com/es/q/developer/){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [gDrive: refactor-plan-implement by students](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Uz3DNDieHc_6Nc8WFbwa5ID15x9DaP_8){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 54 | 27/03/2026 | - <s>`ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.2**, school `CREATE` </br> (0) form  for create new `School`  </br> (1) logic for `School`, new school and assign apartment  </br>  (3) map with schools </s> </br></br>  - Coding with AI, **openCode**, desktop IDE: </br> (1) OpenCode desktop IDE  </br> (2) Tools and skills </br> (3) Test api rest with commands: `api.ts` |  - [ApartmentPrediction-React: 9c4d4597 at refactor-middleware-data-2](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/9c4d459744d95a310874f4d64cc7900b07fc7583){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [api tools](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/9c4d459744d95a310874f4d64cc7900b07fc7583/ApartmentPredictor-React/.opencode/tools/api.ts){.external target='_blank'} </br> </br> - [Rules](https://opencode.ai/docs/rules/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Skills](https://opencode.ai/docs/skills/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Tools](https://opencode.ai/docs/tools/){.external target='_blank'}    |
|   |    | | |
| **#16**  |   55 | 30/03/2026   |  - Spring Boot: DynamoDB SDK v2.x dependency  </br> (1) noSql: pK and sK </br> (2) `Renovations`/`Person` document </br> (3) **Enhanced** client </br> (4) `noSqlPerson` project  </br> </br>  - AWS dynamoDB: </BR> (1) create account   </BR> (2) create table, pk and sk  </BR> (3) root keys and save them  </BR> (4) local `cli aws configure`    | - [noSqlPerson: ca8baaa](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/ca8baaa52434737fe81b197051f8dff09e05c813){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [noSqlPerson: 49fc58](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/49fc584053e4887ceb6061710bd68c5bc1c703af){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SpreadSheet NoSql Renovations](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYF7O0Qzgeu_EFJRh7fej04a0yhB2WTI18R1ccxcaqw/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'}  </br> </br> - [Java 2.x: DynamoDB Enhanced Client](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/developerguide/DynamoDBEnhanced.html){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Map Java objects](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sdk-for-java/latest/developer-guide/dynamodb-enhanced-client.html){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [putItem](https://sdk.amazonaws.com/java/api/latest/software/amazon/awssdk/services/dynamodb/DynamoDbClient.html#putItem(software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.PutItemRequest)){.external target='_blank'}  </br>  - [DynamoDB examples using SDK for Java 2.x: putItem](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sdk-for-java/latest/developer-guide/java_dynamodb_code_examples.html){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [dynamoDB-enhanced](https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-java-v2/blob/master/services-custom/dynamodb-enhanced/README.md){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [dynamoDB-enhanced: ommon-primitive-operations](https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-java-v2/blob/master/services-custom/dynamodb-enhanced/README.md#common-primitive-operations){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/ca8baaa52434737fe81b197051f8dff09e05c813/doc/screenshots/2026-03-30_12-13.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}   </br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/ca8baaa52434737fe81b197051f8dff09e05c813/doc/screenshots/2026-03-30_12-17.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br>[Postman](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/7473960/2sBXinGprw){.external target='_blank'} ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/ca8baaa52434737fe81b197051f8dff09e05c813/doc/screenshots/2026-03-30_12-15.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} |
|   |  56  | 31/03/2026 | - Java Spring Boot: </br> (0) ApartmentPrediction_masterDoc: **v7** </br> (1) `Renovation` domain |  - [ApartmentPrediction: xxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor/tree/xx){.external target='_blank'} </br>  |
: Backlog Sprint#15/16 March 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
